description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, black pole with a rectangular base for stability. At the top, a modern, elongated lamp head extends horizontally from a right-angled arm, giving it a streamlined and functional appearance. The lamp head is flat and rectangular, with a greenish hue and a translucent section likely serving as the light diffuser. The pole itself is plain and unadorned, emphasizing utility over decoration. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the pole and lamp housing, with glass or plastic for the light diffuser.
description: A tall, modern street light with a plain black pole and a flat, rectangular lamp head extending horizontally. The design is minimalist, with a greenish lamp housing and a translucent diffuser.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pole and the horizontally extended, flat lamp head with a greenish housing and translucent section.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the narrow profile of the lamp head and the rectangular base, with minimal visible detail on the lamp head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the lamp head's length and the right-angled arm connecting it to the pole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the lamp head and the plain, unornamented pole, with the lamp head's width visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, flat, rectangular lamp head with a greenish housing and a translucent diffuser, featuring a streamlined, minimalist style with no decorative elements.
